channel.title: Sound Accumulator on
channel.description: Recent content in Sound Accumulator on

item.title: {{title}}
item.description: t-schreibs Name Tyler Schreiber Fav. genre(s) Trip hop, Punk, Electronica Website (website link) About Contributions Trip hop Punk Electronica

item.title: {{title}}
item.description: Punk Punk is a music genre and subculture that was originally rooted in the garage rock movement of the ’60s.

item.title: {{title}}
item.description: Trip hop Trip hop is a fusion music genre that originated in the UK in the 1990s. AKA Downtempo Origins 1990s UK Subgenre(s) About Trip hop pulls from a variety of genres to produce an atmospheric, psychedelic soup of slow-motion sound.
